case_title: HUEBNER, RICHARD B. VS M&K MARKET (A GEN. PARTNERSHIP) et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY HUEBNER, RICHARD B. AS TO DEFENDANT M&K MARKET (A GEN. PARTNERSHIP) TARBOX, MICHAEL, TARBOX, KIM AND CHEA, KEM. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-07-1996 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT C
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT M&K MARKET (A GEN. PARTNERSHIP)
PLTF'S REQUEST FOR A CONTINUANCE SENT TO THE COMMISSIONER FOR APPROVAL.
PETITION FOR MINOR BY AND THROUGH HIS GUARDIAN AD LITEM
PLAINTIFF SUBMITTED IFP APPLICATIO AFTER PAYING $15.00 CASH. IFP GRANTED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUEBNER, RICHARD B. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT M&K MARKET (A GEN. PARTNERSHIP) TARBOX, MICHAEL, TARBOX, KIM AND CHEA, KEM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-07-1996, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO OCT-28-1996 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT C
